review: I stopped by Pho Street for a delicious Vietnamese meal and was not disappointed. The pho was rich and flavorful, with tender beef and fresh herbs. The service was friendly and attentive, and the casual ambiance made for a great dining experience. While it wasn't the best pho I've ever had, it was definitely a solid choice for a quick and satisfying meal. I'd definitely recommend Pho Street to anyone looking for authentic Vietnamese flavors in Philadelphia.
